description: Spearheaded the backend development for diverse digital products, including large-scale e-commerce data engines and high-traffic EdTech platforms, with a strong focus on system scalability and business-driven solutions.
achievements: Architected a high-throughput data synchronization pipeline integrating with Shopify and Amazon APIs, successfully processing over 2 million daily orders with 99.9% consistency.
Designed and optimized scalable RESTful APIs for digital education platforms, supporting heavy concurrent user traffic while reducing overall system latency by 30%.
Built resilient backend services for internal Agile management tools, implementing real-time features and secure access control to streamline engineering workflows.
Collaborated closely with cross-functional product teams to translate complex business requirements into robust, high-performance technical architectures.

description: Maintained and enhanced e-commerce platforms for the Japanese market, focusing on delivering tailored backend features and data solutions to empower the marketing team's sales campaigns.
achievements: Maintained and optimized existing e-commerce applications, ensuring high system availability and seamless shopping experiences for the Japanese market.
Developed and rapidly deployed custom features for promotional campaigns, enabling the marketing team to quickly launch and manage seasonal sales events.
Engineered custom data extraction and reporting tools, providing the marketing team with accurate, real-time data for campaign analysis and targeted strategies.
Collaborated efficiently with cross-border teams to translate marketing requirements into technical solutions, significantly reducing time-to-market for new business initiatives.

description: Spearheaded e-commerce development for the new Vietnam branch, specializing in custom Shopify app engineering, complex legacy system modernization, and large-scale data migrations.
achievements: Orchestrated the seamless migration of over 1 million historical order records from legacy e-commerce platforms to Shopify, ensuring zero data loss and strict data integrity.
Engineered and deployed custom Shopify applications tailored to individual store needs, extending core functionalities and enhancing the merchant experience.
Refactored and optimized complex legacy codebases, significantly improving data processing performance and reducing technical debt.
Analyzed and translated outdated, custom business logic to align flawlessly with Shopify's ecosystem, strictly adhering to its API rate limits and architectural constraints.
